name: Protective Asset Allocation
description: Keller & Keuning PAA across all 13 assets: 12 risky assets (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD, SSLN, SGLN, COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA) with VUTY bonds as the safe asset. Allocates defensively by shifting weight to bonds based on how many risky assets are below their 12-month SMA.
